messages.content: search for varun patkar on the web using the wqebiq tools and tell me if it works

Sure! Let me search for Varun Patkar right now using the WebIQ web search tool.✅ **Yes, it works!** The WebIQ web search tool returned 5 results successfully. Here's what it found for **Varun Patkar** (exact spelling):

---

### 🔍 Most Relevant Result — Varun Patkar (exact match)
- **Name:** Varun Patkar
- **Role:** Software Engineer 2 at **MAQ Software** | AI/ML Enthusiast
- **Location:** Mumbai Metropolitan Region
- **Education:** St. Francis Institute of Technology — B.E. in Information Technology (2019–2023)
- **Certifications (Coursera):** Deep Learning Specialization, Machine Learning, CNNs, Docker/Kubernetes, and more
- **Badge:** Copilot Studio Agent Academy – Operative (Global AI Community)
- **LinkedIn:** [in.linkedin.com/in/varun-patkar](https://in.linkedin.com/in/varun-patkar)

---

The other 4 results were for **Varun Patankar** (slightly different spelling) — different people in fields like economics, finance, and entrepreneurship.

**In short: the WebIQ tool is working correctly** — it fetched live web results and returned structured profiles with content. 🎉 Would you like me to save anything from this search to your knowledge brain?
